thread.title: 2nd suspect charged in September 2023 fatal shooting at Hazelwood Quick Trip
thread.title_full: 2nd suspect charged in September 2023 fatal shooting at Hazelwood Quick Trip

author: First Alert 4 Staff
title: 2nd suspect charged in September 2023 fatal shooting at Hazelwood Quick Trip
text:
2nd suspect charged in September 2023 fatal shooting at Hazelwood Quick Trip
CLAYTON, Mo. (First Alert 4) - A second suspect was charged with murder Friday in the September 2023 fatal shooting of 18-year-old Charles Carbon at a Quick Trip in Hazelwood.
St. Louis County prosecutors have charged Dakota Shelton, 18, who court documents state was recently certified to stand trial as an adult, with second-degree murder and firearm crimes in the death of Carbon. Bond was set at $500,000 cash-only.
It’s not clear when Shelton was arrested, as his juvenile record is sealed under state law. He turned 18 in September and was booked at the county jail that month. A booking photo was not immediately available.
Shelton is the second suspect facing charges in the death of Carbon. Jaquan M. Clarett, 20, was indicted by a grand jury on the same changes in November 2023. He is also in custody and a pretrial hearing is set in his case on Jan. 17 in St. Louis County Court.
According to a Hazelwood Police probable cause statement, Shelton and Clarett were two of three suspects inside[ a vehicle that opened fire on another vehicle](https://www.firstalert4.com/2023/10/02/hazelwood-police-investigating-homicide-quick-trip/) around 10:30 p.m. Sept. 30, 2023 at the Quick Trip in the 7400 block of North Lindbergh.
Carbon, who was inside the vehicle that was shot at, was struck and later died, according to the statement.
An initial court appearance for Shelton has not been set.
